title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 253.022 - Department of natural resources to administer the National Historic Preservation Act
text:
253.022.  Department of natural resources to administer the National Historic Preservation Act. — The department of natural resources is authorized to administer the National Historic Preservation Act of 1966, Public Law 89-665.
(L. 1972 H.B. 1477 § 1, A.L. 2010 H.B. 1965)
